LanguageData.UB_SNS_FursuitMaker.title: Fursuit Maker
LanguageData.UB_SNS_FursuitMaker.description: In a bind for money, [PAWN_nameDef] turned to making fursuits in order to make ends meet. But [PAWN_pronoun] quickly learned that they had a knack for making those furry costumes people would pay top dollar for!
